name: urban-hero-collaboration
description: 都市异能题材的角色档案与事件协作站

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.db:init: npm run prisma:migrate --prefix backend && npm run prisma:seed --prefix backend
